game_name: Dungeons & Dragons: Warriors of the Eternal Sun

special_mechanics.name: Turn-Based Combat Mode
special_mechanics.description: Outside combat mode uses turn-based system where selected character can move short distance, attack, or use special ability. Each PC highlighted with white box during their turn.

special_mechanics.name: Real-Time Dungeon Combat
special_mechanics.description: First-person dungeon mode features real-time enemy encounters with faster-paced combat style. Weapons and spells have different effects in this mode.

special_mechanics.name: Party Movement
special_mechanics.description: In outside adventure mode with isometric view, party is controlled as one unit. Each member follows lead character's movements in real-time.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - This is primarily an RPG with multiple gameplay modes (isometric adventure, turn-based combat, first-person dungeons). Movement physics are not a design focus; no documented movement parameters, gravity values, or jump mechanics. Data sourced from Wikipedia gameplay description only.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Dungeons & Dragons: Warriors of the Eternal Sun
